verses.text: God gave new tables, which Moses put in the ark. New tables. Grace renewed the covenant.
God gave new tables, which Moses put in the ark. New tables. Grace renewed the covenant.
God gave new tables, which Moses put in the ark. New tables. Grace renewed the covenant.
God gave new tables, which Moses put in the ark. New tables. Grace renewed the covenant.
God gave new tables, which Moses put in the ark. New tables. Grace renewed the covenant.
The Levites were set apart to bear the ark and to bless. The Levites. They have the LORD for their portion.
The Levites were set apart to bear the ark and to bless. The Levites. They have the LORD for their portion.
The Levites were set apart to bear the ark and to bless. The Levites. They have the LORD for their portion.
The Levites were set apart to bear the ark and to bless. The Levites. They have the LORD for their portion.
God hearkened to Moses and bade them go in to possess. Heard. Mercy let them proceed.
God hearkened to Moses and bade them go in to possess. Heard. Mercy let them proceed.
'What doth the LORD require... but to fear... and to love him?' Required. God asks the heart.
'What doth the LORD require... but to fear... and to love him?' Required. God asks the heart.
Heaven is His, yet He chose you; circumcise your heart. Chosen. Inward devotion is sought.
Heaven is His, yet He chose you; circumcise your heart. Chosen. Inward devotion is sought.
Heaven is His, yet He chose you; circumcise your heart. Chosen. Inward devotion is sought.
God takes no bribe and loves the stranger; so love the stranger. Like God. Mercy mirrors His own.
God takes no bribe and loves the stranger; so love the stranger. Like God. Mercy mirrors His own.
God takes no bribe and loves the stranger; so love the stranger. Like God. Mercy mirrors His own.
Fear Him, cleave to Him; He has made you many. Cleave. He is your praise and your God.
Fear Him, cleave to Him; He has made you many. Cleave. He is your praise and your God.
Fear Him, cleave to Him; He has made you many. Cleave. He is your praise and your God.
